title: Maigo no Onnanoko wo Ie made Todoketara, Genkan kara Detekita no wa Gakunen Ichi no Bishoujo deshita

en.title: The sound and light, etched into your heart—
If it’s at the festival, can these hidden feelings…?
I’ll Only Show My Precious Smile to You!

chapterSourceTitle: Ore wa Shiranai Uchi ni Gakkou Ichi no Bishoujo wo Kudoite Itarashii
englishFallbackProviderTitle: Ore wa Shiranai Uchi ni Gakkou Ichi no Bishoujo wo Kudoite Itarashii
